data.title: Update CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md, component-discovery-schema.json, REVIEWER-FILE-CHECKLIST.md, and SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md for ui-designer architecture
data.description:
## What
Update four documentation files to reflect the architecture change: design work now performed by the dso:ui-designer agent (not /dso:design-wireframe skill).

## Changes Required

### plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md
Lines 362, 373, 381, 384: update 'Used by: /dso:design-wireframe' → 'Used by: dso:ui-designer agent (via /dso:preplanning)'
Line 381: update the description mentioning 'design-wireframe' → 'ui-designer agent'

### plugins/dso/docs/component-discovery-schema.json
Line 5: update description from 'design skills (design-wireframe, ui-discover)' → 'design skills (dso:ui-designer agent, ui-discover)'

### plugins/dso/docs/REVIEWER-FILE-CHECKLIST.md
Line 4: update reference from 'skills/design-wireframe/docs/reviewers/' to reflect new pattern — if design-wireframe is being redirected to a stub, reference the appropriate reviewer file location or remove the design-wireframe-specific example

### plugins/dso/docs/SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md
Check for any design-wireframe references (none confirmed as of story creation). If any ui-designer-specific boundary rules need documenting (e.g., CACHE_MISSING return protocol), add them.

## Acceptance Criteria
- All 4 'Used by: /dso:design-wireframe' references in CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md updated
- component-discovery-schema.json description updated to reference ui-designer agent
- REVIEWER-FILE-CHECKLIST.md no longer references the old design-wireframe skill path
- SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md is accurate (no stale design-wireframe references remain)
- No tests that check these doc files fail after the update

## testing_mode: UPDATE
